title: REBIRTH: Paintings
description: Add a splash of paint onto your experience with a whole new set of paintings!
body: REBIRTH PAINTINGS DESCRIPTION REBIRTH: Paintings Is a cosmetic Minecraft mod project trying to add a bit of life to your game by making everything just a little bit more beautiful with paintings. I always really liked the paintings in Minecraft but I always felt like Minecraft lacked in the amount of paintings there were so I decided to make this mod to add more the game. This first started off as something I made for myself but I decided that maybe someone out there can relate so I uploaded this for those like me who want to have more decoration in Minecraft. I hope you enjoy this mod and the paintings I add to the game, thank you for taking your time to try it out! FEATURED CURRENT CATALOG - 250 PAINTINGS
